text.title: Value Stream Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals (telemetry coverage, sample size, customer-anchor presence, AI-PR mix) to instrument-first / measure-only / declare-constraint / experiment.

conclusion.verdict: instrument-first; do NOT run VSM until coverage is sufficient — produces folklore otherwise

branch.question: customer_anchor anchored at user-request AND value-received events?

conclusion.verdict: reject the map; re-anchor before measuring — internal endpoints produce misleading reports
emit insufficient_data: true; measure only; do NOT declare constraint
enforce human/bot split in DORA; reject reports without split; proceed to constraint declaration
proceed to constraint declaration; pair DF with CFR; rank experiments with expected lift + cost

text.example: telemetry_sources=5 → window_days=90 → ready → anchor=ticket+prod → valid → samples=[62,110,55,58] >= 50 → ok → bot/human split → ai_present=true → enforce split → declare design-review constraint.
